name: Operations/expand-operation
description: ValueSet $expand operation conformance tests ported from Microsoft.Health.Fhir.Shared.Tests.E2E Rest/Conformance/ExpandOperationTests.cs. $expand is fully synchronous. Covers type-level GET ($expand?url=), instance-level GET (ValueSet/{id}/$expand, which must use the ValueSet's own canonical url and ignore any incoming url/valueSet parameter), the Parameters-wrapped POST variant, and the missing-required-parameter / unknown-parameter / unknown-ValueSet error paths. Fixtures reuse the two real HL7 code systems (http://hl7.org/fhir/FHIR-version and http://hl7.org/fhir/account-status) referenced by the fhir-server test suite's own Expand-ValueSets.json sample, but wrap them in NEW ValueSets with unique http://ignixa.io/testscript/valueset/* canonical urls to avoid collisions with other suites/fixtures on a shared server.

test.name: $expand type-level: expands by canonical url
test.description: GET /ValueSet/$expand?url=http://ignixa.io/testscript/valueset/expand-fhir-version must return an expanded ValueSet whose expansion.contains is non-empty (the FHIR-version code system is a stable, server-independent HL7 code system).

assert.description: Expansion must contain at least one code
Expansion should contain the well-known code 4.0.1 (warningOnly: exact code-system contents depend on the server's terminology data)

test.name: $expand instance-level: uses the ValueSet's own canonical url, ignoring an incoming url parameter
test.description: GET /ValueSet/fhir262-vs-acctstatus/$expand?url=http://ignixa.io/testscript/valueset/expand-fhir-version (a DIFFERENT ValueSet's url, deliberately mismatched) must still expand fhir262-vs-acctstatus itself: the instance's own canonical url takes precedence and the incoming url parameter is ignored, matching GivenValueSet_WhenExpandById_ThenValueSetShouldBeReturnedCorrectly.

assert.description: Returned ValueSet.url must be the instance's OWN canonical url, not the mismatched incoming url parameter
Expansion must contain at least one code

test.name: $expand: Parameters-wrapped POST body variant
test.description: POST /ValueSet/$expand with a Parameters resource carrying the 'url' parameter (instead of a query string) must expand the same ValueSet as the equivalent GET, matching the Parameters-POST form exercised by ExpandOperationTests' parameter-object overloads.

operation.description: POST ValueSet/$expand with a Parameters body (url=http://ignixa.io/testscript/valueset/expand-fhir-version)

assert.description: Expansion must contain at least one code

test.name: $expand: missing required parameter returns 400
test.description: GET /ValueSet/$expand (no url, no id, no valueSet body parameter) is missing all required inputs and must be rejected with 400, matching GivenAValueSet_WhenExpandingByIdAndUrl_ThenBadRequestIsReturned's Api.Resources.ExpandMissingRequiredParameter case.

test.name: $expand: unknown parameter returns 400
test.description: GET /ValueSet/$expand?url=...&bogusParam=true with an unrecognized parameter must be rejected with 400, matching the unknown-parameter case in ExpandOperationTests.

test.name: $expand: unknown ValueSet id returns 404
test.description: GET /ValueSet/fhir262-does-not-exist/$expand for a nonexistent ValueSet id must return 404 with an OperationOutcome (error severity, not-found code).

assert.description: Response should be an OperationOutcome with an error/not-found issue (warningOnly: exact issue code may vary by server)

test.name: $expand: unknown ValueSet url returns 404
test.description: GET /ValueSet/$expand?url=http://ignixa.io/testscript/valueset/does-not-exist for a canonical url with no matching ValueSet must return 404 with an OperationOutcome, matching GivenAValueSetURL_WhenExpandingByUrl_ThenNotFoundIsReturned.

assert.description: Response should be an OperationOutcome with an error/not-found issue (warningOnly: exact issue code may vary by server)
